name: pyqt6-3d-qt6

metadata.name: PyQt6-3D-Qt6
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for pyqt6-3d-qt6==6.8.1

documentation:
This package contains the subset of a Qt installation that is required by
PyQt6-3D.  It would normally be installed automatically by pip when
you install PyQt6-3D.

This package is licensed under the terms of the LGPL v3.
